task_completion.description: Verify that the sales_data.csv file has been loaded into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI interface should list the imported table (likely named 'sales_data') with its respective fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'Product_Rank' and 'Performance_Tier' calculated columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane should show 'Product_Rank' and 'Performance_Tier' with a calculated column icon (a table with a sigma/fx symbol), or the DAX formula bar should be visible showing the formula for one of these columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'Tier_Revenue' and 'Avg_Discount' DAX measures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane should show 'Tier_Revenue' and 'Avg_Discount' with a measure icon (a small calculator), or the DAX formula bar should display their respective SUM and AVERAGE formulas.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a 100% Stacked Bar Chart configured with the correct fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report canvas should contain a 100% Stacked Bar Chart. In the Visualizations pane, the Y-axis should be set to Region, X-axis to Tier_Revenue, and Legend to Performance_Tier.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a Multi-Row Card displaying the required measures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report canvas should contain a Multi-Row Card visual that displays the values for 'Tier_Revenue' and 'Avg_Discount'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a Table visual with the correct fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report canvas should contain a Table visual displaying columns for Product_Category, Product_Rank, Performance_Tier, and Tier_Revenue.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI Desktop application title bar should read 'Product_Tier_Report - Power BI Desktop', or the file 'Product_Tier_Report.pbix' should be visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Power BI Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the standard Power BI Desktop interface (ribbon, canvas, visualization pane, data pane) rather than a terminal, script editor, or text file.

integrity.description: Verify that DAX formulas were entered natively within Power BI.
integrity.visual_evidence: DAX formulas should be visible in the Power BI formula bar at the top of the canvas, indicating genuine interaction with the application's modeling tools.

integrity.description: Verify that the visuals are genuinely rendered by Power BI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visuals on the canvas should have standard Power BI formatting, tooltips, or selection handles, proving they are not pasted images or mockups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: 'Product_Tier_Report.pbix'. Required calculated columns: 'Product_Rank' and 'Performance_Tier'. Required DAX measures: 'Tier_Revenue' and 'Avg_Discount'. Required visuals: 100% Stacked Bar Chart (hundredPercentStackedBarChart), Multi-Row Card (multiRowCard), and Table (tableEx).
